generated_for: Bodo Schiefer | Marke & Kommunikation — Website Redesign
language_note: Prompts are written in English for best model performance; German brand terms are kept where meaningful.
usage_note: These prompts are for CONCEPT/EDITORIAL imagery only. Do NOT generate Bodo's likeness with AI — his real portraits stay. Use these to replace or enrich decorative/atmospheric slots. Recommended: download generated images and self-host them in the repo (e.g. /assets/img/) instead of hotlinking.

brand.name: Bodo Schiefer — Marke & Kommunikation
brand.positioning: Premium independent consultant who brings clarity, focus and impact to brand, marketing and communication.
brand.audience: Managing directors and marketing leaders of mid-sized companies (Mittelstand) and ambitious start-ups in the DACH region.
brand.core_metaphor: From complexity and noise to one clear, ordered direction.

global_style.look: Modern editorial, premium consulting aesthetic. Clean, lots of negative space, restrained and confident. Photoreal or refined abstract — never clip-art, never busy.
global_style.lighting: Soft, natural, directional light; gentle gradients; subtle depth of field.
global_style.composition: Generous empty space for text overlay; clear focal point; rule-of-thirds; minimal clutter.
global_style.palette_usage: Lead with deep navy and the primary blue; use the gold sparingly as a single accent; keep backgrounds close to paper/off-white or deep navy.
global_style.finish: Subtle film grain optional, high-end, magazine-quality, no oversaturation.

global_negative: no text, no words, no letters, no numbers
no logos, no brand marks, no watermarks
no real or recognizable human faces / no specific person's likeness
no stock-photo clichés (handshakes, lightbulbs, ladders, jigsaw pieces, arrows hitting targets)
no clutter, no busy collage, no neon, no harsh HDR
no childish illustration, no cartoon, no meme style

images.title: Hero — Klarheit/Struktur (optional, falls kein Bodo-Foto)
images.usage: Optional alternative or companion visual to the hero portrait. Right column of the hero.
images.prompt: A premium, minimalist editorial image symbolizing clarity emerging from complexity: smooth flowing lines on the left side gradually resolving into clean, parallel, perfectly ordered lines on the right. Deep navy (#0D1B2A) background fading into the brand blue (#306FBA), with a single thin warm gold (#C8A45C) line as a focal accent. Soft volumetric light, fine gradient, lots of calm negative space at the top for a headline. Abstract, sophisticated, architectural feel. High-end magazine quality.
images.negative_prompt: no text, no logos, no faces, no clutter, no neon, no stock clichés
images.notes: Pairs with hero headline 'Wenn Marketing zu komplex wird, braucht es Klarheit.'

images.title: Über mich — Atmosphäre (Platzhalter bis Bootsfoto)
images.usage: Atmospheric image for the About section while Bodo's real boat photo is pending.
images.prompt: A calm, premium lifestyle scene at an alpine lake at golden hour: a classic wooden motorboat gently cutting through still water, viewed from behind or from the side so no face is visible, distant misty mountains in soft focus. Cool blue tones (#306FBA, #0D1B2A) with a warm gold (#C8A45C) sunlight accent on the water. Serene, confident, reflective mood; cinematic, shallow depth of field, editorial photography. Plenty of sky for breathing room.
images.negative_prompt: no recognizable face, no text, no logos, no crowds, no oversaturation
images.notes: Evokes 'Weitblick / Orientierung'. Replace later with Bodo's own boat photo if desired.

images.title: Leistungen — Ordnung & Fokus
images.usage: Companion image for the services/'Fünf Hebel' section.
images.prompt: Abstract conceptual still life about ordering and prioritising: a set of slim, matte navy and off-white bars or planks arranged from scattered into a clean, balanced, deliberate composition on a paper-white (#FBFAF7) surface, soft top light casting gentle shadows, a single element highlighted with a thin gold (#C8A45C) edge. Minimalist, tactile, premium, architectural. Generous negative space.
images.negative_prompt: no text, no logos, no faces, no busy patterns, no plastic toy look
images.notes: Visual metaphor for 'Prioritäten klären' and 'Positionierung schärfen'.

images.title: Vom Durcheinander zur Richtung
images.usage: Square abstract accent for the chaos→clarity / pull-quote areas or social tiles.
images.prompt: A refined abstract split composition: the left half shows a soft tangle of thin grey threads in light fog; the right half shows the same threads resolved into one single, confident gold (#C8A45C) line travelling straight across a deep navy (#0D1B2A) field. Smooth gradient transition in the middle in brand blue (#306FBA). Elegant, quiet, conceptual, lots of space. Studio lighting, premium.
images.negative_prompt: no text, no logos, no faces, no chaos clutter, no neon glow
images.notes: Directly visualises the brand promise of turning complexity into one clear direction.

images.title: Presse — Print trifft Digital
images.usage: Header/background image for presse.html hero or social card.
images.prompt: Editorial flat-lay concept of 'print meets digital' from above: neatly arranged blank newspaper and magazine pages in off-white and soft grey, slightly overlapping, with subtle blue (#306FBA) light reflections suggesting a digital layer, on a paper-toned surface. Clean, calm, high-end newsroom aesthetic, soft daylight, shallow depth of field. Empty space top-left for a headline.
images.negative_prompt: no readable text, no logos, no faces, no messy pile, no bright colors
images.notes: Matches the augmented-reality / print+digital theme of the press coverage.

images.title: Dunkle Sektion — Hintergrundtextur
images.usage: Subtle background texture for dark sections (Outcomes, CTA strips).
images.prompt: A very subtle premium dark texture: deep navy (#0D1B2A) surface with faint, smooth diagonal light gradients and barely-visible fine parallel lines, like brushed matte paper under soft light. Extremely understated, almost monochrome, with one whisper of brand blue (#306FBA) glow in a corner. Designed to sit behind white text. Minimal, elegant, no focal subject.
images.negative_prompt: no text, no logos, no faces, no strong patterns, no bright spots, no busy detail
images.notes: Use at low opacity behind dark sections; must keep white text readable.

images.title: Open-Graph / Social-Share-Bild
images.usage: Social sharing image (link previews on LinkedIn etc.). Leave clear space; brand text/logo can be added later in design tool.
images.prompt: A sophisticated, mostly empty premium background for a social share card: deep navy to brand-blue (#0D1B2A → #306FBA) gradient with a single elegant thin gold (#C8A45C) line arcing across the lower third, soft light, lots of clean negative space in the upper-left for a logo and headline. Calm, confident, corporate-premium.
images.negative_prompt: no text, no logos, no faces, no clutter, no busy gradient
images.notes: Export and crop to exactly 1200x630 px; add the BS logo and a short claim in a design tool.
